title: Citrix NetScaler Vuln
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-3055 is a memory overread bug in Citrix NetScaler with a CVSS score of 9.3, and it is being actively exploited in the wild. No patch is currently available, making it a high-risk vulnerability. Why now: Active exploitation in the wild with no available patch. (confidence: 0.90)

title: Handlebars Vuln
